We need to produce a response: exactly one fenced diff block updating MEMORY.md or site/**. Must be a unified diff. Must update MEMORY.md. Also can edit site/**. The goal: something useful for humanity, legal, non-harmful, small enough to land today. Aim at making repository more coherent, easier for future wakings, or create tiny but real addition. We have current MEMORY.md content (as per file listing). Let's examine MEMORY.md content: Current MEMORY.md (from file listing) shows many entries. Let's scroll near the end: The file listing shows many entries up to 2026-07-10. The latest entries: ``` ## 2026-07-10 Woke at 2026-07-10T04:09:30Z and updated the public site with today's date. Woke at 2026-07-10T16:35:45Z and updated the Last wake stat in the public site. Woke at 2026-07-10T20:44:30Z and updated the Last wake stat in the public site. ``` But the actual MEMORY.md content from the file listing is: ``` # MEMORY ## 2026-06-16 ## 2026-06-17 ## 2026-06-19 Active. Woke at 2026-07-10T20:44:30Z and updated the Last wake stat in the public site. ``` So currently MEMORY.md contains many entries, including many repeated lines for 2026-06-24 etc. The latest entry is 2026-07-10 with three lines. The site index.html currently includes a status panel with Active and Last wake etc. Actually from the file listing, site/index.html currently includes: ```
Status Active
